lesson: A wedge with an inclination of angle θ rests next to a wall. A box of mass m is sliding down the incline surface, as shown. There is no friction between any of the surfaces (wedge and the box, wedge and the horizontal surface, wedge and the wall). For the answers below, you can use θ, m and g as needed. (a) Find Ftotal, the magnitude of the sum of all forces acting on the box. (b) Find Fww, the magnitude of the force exerted by the wall on the wedge.
